---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-06"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(sf)
library(biscale)
library(janitor)
library(innovar)
library(cowplot)
```


```{r}
wi_sae <- read.csv("./data/final_data/resultados_SAE_loreto_wi.csv")
edu_sae <- read.csv("./data/final_data/resultados_SAE_loreto_edu.csv")

data("Peru")

distritos <- Peru %>% filter(dep == "LORETO") %>% mutate(ubigeo = as.integer(ubigeo))
```

```{r}
wi_sae_fh2<- wi_sae %>% filter(modelo =="modelo_fh2_spatial_2")

edu_sae_fh2<- edu_sae %>% filter(modelo =="modelo_fh2_spatial_2")
```


```{r}
malaria_dist_total <- read_csv("./data/aux_data/malaria_dist_total.csv") %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  filter(year %in% c(2010:2020)) %>% 
  right_join(distritos) %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
  mutate(
    malaria_incidence = ifelse(is.na(malaria_incidence),0,malaria_incidence)
  )

malaria_dist_specie <- read_csv("data/aux_data/malaria_dist_species.csv") %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  right_join(distritos) %>% 
  st_as_sf() %>% 
    mutate(
    malaria_incidence = ifelse(is.na(malaria_incidence),0,malaria_incidence)
  )

```

# MALARIA -----

```{r}
malaria_dist_total %>% 
  
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = log1p(malaria_incidence))) +
  
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 4) +
  theme_void() +
scale_fill_gradient(low = "#deebf7", high = "#08519c", name = "log(1 + Malaria incidence per 1000 hab.)")  +
  guides(fill = guide_colourbar(barheight = .5, 
                                barwidth = 14,
                                title.position = "top",
                                direction = "horizontal")) +
  
  theme(
    legend.position = c(.9,.05),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave("./figures/test2.png", dpi = 800, bg = "white", width = 10)
```


# INDICE RIQUEZA -----
```{r}
data<-
   malaria_dist_total %>% 
  full_join(wi_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )

data2<-
   malaria_dist_specie %>% 
  full_join(wi_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )



```


```{r}
data_bi <- bi_class(data, y = wi_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")

data_bi2 <- bi_class(data2, y = wi_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")
```


```{r}
map <- 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi, mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
 theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 3)
```


```{r}
map2<-
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi2 %>% 
            filter(year %in% c(2010,2013,2017,2020)),
          mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
  theme_void() +
  facet_grid(enfermedad~year)
```


```{r}
legend <- bi_legend(pal = "DkViolet",
                    dim = 3,
                    xlab = "malaria incidence",
                    ylab = "% poverty",
                    size = 8)
```


```{r}
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.65, .08, 0.2, 0.2)
```


```{r}
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map2, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.65, .08, 0.13, 0.15)
```


```{r}
ggsave("./figures/fig8.png", dpi = 300, bg = "white", width = 9, height = 10)

```

# EDUCACION -----
```{r}
data<-
   malaria_dist_total %>% 
  full_join(edu_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )


data2<-
   malaria_dist_specie %>% 
  full_join(edu_sae_fh2, by = c('year','ubigeo')) %>% 
  mutate(
    year = as.character(year)
  )
```


```{r}
data_bi <- bi_class(data, y = edu_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")

data_bi2 <- bi_class(data2, y = edu_estimate_prop, x = malaria_incidence, dim = 3, style = "quantile")
```


```{r}
map <- 
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi, mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
  labs(
    #title = "Malaria incidence distribution across education level"
  ) +
 theme_void() +
  facet_wrap(~year, ncol = 3)
```


```{r}
map2<-
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = data_bi2 %>% 
            filter(year %in% c(2010,2013,2017,2020)),
          mapping = aes(fill = bi_class), color = "white", size = 0.1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  bi_scale_fill(pal = "DkViolet", dim = 3) +
  theme_void() +
  facet_grid(enfermedad~year)
```


```{r}
legend <- bi_legend(pal = "DkViolet",
                    dim = 3,
                    xlab = "malaria incidence",
                    ylab = "% Elementary education",
                    size = 8)
```


```{r}
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.65, .08, 0.2, 0.2)
```

```{r}
ggdraw() +
  draw_plot(map2, 0, 0, 1, 1) +
  draw_plot(legend, 0.65, .08, 0.13, 0.15)
```

```{r}
ggsave("./figures/fig9.png", dpi = 300, bg = "white", width = 9, height = 10)
```
